title: UpCadhoc Card Purchase
description: How do I order, manage, and track an UpCadhoc gift voucher or card using the available user and management portals?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed guidance on accessing their personal or management space to purchase an UpCadhoc gift certificate or card, view order status, and understand the benefits and usage options of the multi‑brand voucher. Relevant documents must describe UpCadhoc’s ordering workflow, tracking features, user‑space navigation, and the range of products and services covered by the voucher. Documents about unrelated gift‑card programs (e.g., Decathlon) are not relevant.

title: Quick Lamb Tajine
description: What is a fast, savory lamb tagine recipe that can be prepared in under 30 minutes?
narrative: The user is looking for a lamb tagine recipe that is quick to make (approximately 20‑25 minutes) and emphasizes savory flavors such as lemon confit, chilies, olives, and vegetables. Relevant documents describe an easy lamb tagine with these ingredients and a short cooking time. Documents that focus on longer‑cooking, sweetened versions (e.g., with dates, honey, almonds) or that lack the stated quick preparation are not relevant.

title: Lotus Elise Price
description: What were the original market price, fuel consumption, and CO2 emissions of the Lotus Elise when it was first sold?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed launch‑time specifications for the Lotus Elise, specifically the price range (in euros), fuel consumption (L/100 km), and CO₂ emissions (g/km) for the original model released in 1998. Relevant documents must provide these quantitative details for the new Lotus Elise, while documents that only list unrelated car listings, broad automotive catalogs, or generic information about other makes/models are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiette Recipes
description: What are the detailed, step‑by‑step veal paupiette recipes (including ingredients, preparation and cooking times, and photos) that I can prepare quickly and easily?
narrative: The user is looking for full recipe pages that describe how to make veal paupiettes, providing ingredient lists, clear instructions, cooking/baking times, and preferably accompanying photos. Relevant documents are recipe collections that list multiple veal paupiette preparations, often with preparation times (e.g., 10 min prep, 1 h bake) and sauce variations. Non‑relevant material consists of forum discussions, side‑dish suggestions, personal anecdotes, or generic comments that do not present a complete recipe. Only sources that function as standalone recipes meeting the criteria should be considered relevant.

title: Car Sun Visor
description: What types of car sun visors exist and how are they installed to protect occupants from UV rays?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about car sun visors, including the different models (e.g., roll‑up, suction‑cup, electrostatic), their dimensions, installation techniques, and their effectiveness for shielding drivers and rear‑seat passengers (especially infants) from sunlight and UV radiation. Relevant documents describe these visor types, installation steps, and protective benefits; documents unrelated to automotive sun protection (e.g., 3‑D model listings, unrelated product ads) are not relevant.

title: Petit Bateau Live Shopping
description: What are the details of Petit Bateau's live shopping sessions and associated loyalty program for baby and children's clothing?
narrative: The user is looking for information about Petit Bateau's online live shopping events, including how to join, what products are showcased (e.g., baby and child clothing collections), the ability to ask expert questions during the 30‑minute sessions, and how the loyalty program (points, rewards, Grande Tribu) works in conjunction with purchases. Relevant documents should describe these features, while documents that only mention store closures, gift‑card redemption procedures, or unrelated contact lists are not relevant.

title: Renault Collaborator Price

title: Unemployment Right Options

title: Mildewed Tomato Safety
description: Are tomatoes showing symptoms of downy mildew or late blight safe to eat, store, or use for home‑canning?
narrative: The user wants reliable information on the health risks and culinary suitability of tomatoes infected with downy mildew or late blight. Documents that discuss seed saving, storage of recovered produce, or expert opinions from plant pathologists are considered relevant, while unrelated vegetable topics (e.g., yacon cultivation) are not.

title: Gaulish Ethnography

title: Potato Disease Management
description: What integrated control methods are effective against downy mildew and rhizoctonia in temperate potato fields?
narrative: The user wants detailed information on preventive and curative strategies for the two major fungal diseases affecting potatoes—Phytophthora infestans (late blight/downy mildew) and Rhizoctonia solani—under temperate conditions (15‑25 °C, moderate humidity). Relevant content must describe symptoms, environmental conditions that favor these pathogens, and management approaches such as crop rotation, resistant cultivars, agronomic practices, and fungicide treatments. title: New Potato Rissolée
description: What are the best practices and step‑by‑step instructions for preparing sautéed (rissolée) new potatoes to achieve a crisp exterior and tender interior?
narrative: The user is seeking a detailed, authentic recipe for cooking new potatoes (also called "shot" or "early potatoes") using the rissolée technique. Relevant documents should describe the characteristics of new potatoes, preparation (washing, optional soaking, gentle drying, keeping the thin skin), the choice of fat (butter or butter‑oil mix), pan or casserole selection, heat management (medium then high, avoiding burning), timing (approximately 45‑50 minutes total), turning frequency, addition of a splash of water/steam, and finishing touches such as fleur de sel. title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: Can a person with a permanent contract (CDI) who has worked only one month claim the French return‑to‑work bonus?
